CVE-2025-11149.title: This affects all versions of the package node-static; all version ...
CVE-2025-11149.description: This affects all versions of the package node-static; all versions of the package @nubosoftware/node-static. The package fails to catch an exception when user input includes null bytes. This allows attackers to access http://host/%00 and crash the server.
